---
title: "PREVENT-AD Demographic Summary"
output: html_document
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = FALSE, message = FALSE, warnings = FALSE)
knitr::opts_knit$set(root.dir = here::here())
```

```{r setting}
library(stringr)

source('workflow/scripts/config.R')

clinical_raw <- readRDS(file.path(DATA_INTERMEDIATE_PATH, "PREVENTAD_clinical_raw.rds"))
lifestyle_raw <- readRDS(file.path(DATA_INTERMEDIATE_PATH, "PREVENTAD_lifestyle_raw.rds"))
apoe <- readRDS(file.path(DATA_INTERMEDIATE_PATH, "PREVENTAD_apoe.rds"))
biomarkers <- readRDS(file.path(DATA_INTERMEDIATE_PATH, "PREVENTAD_biomarkers.rds"))
diagnosis <- readRDS(file.path(DATA_INTERMEDIATE_PATH, "PREVENTAD_diagnosis.rds"))
PREVENTAD_dat <- readRDS(file.path(DATA_INTERMEDIATE_PATH, "PREVENTAD_dat.rds"))
```

# Demographics stratified by clinical diagnosis
```{r}
table1_gtsummary <- PREVENTAD_dat$demographics %>% #clinical_raw %>%
  select(CONP_ID, Sex, Education_years, Ethnicity) %>%
  left_join((diagnosis %>%
               group_by(CONP_ID) %>%
               slice_tail() %>%
              select(CONP_ID, Clinical_diagnosis)), by="CONP_ID") %>%
  left_join((clinical_raw %>%
               select(CONP_ID, Candidate_Age)), by="CONP_ID") %>%
  left_join((apoe %>%
               select(CONP_ID, apoe_category)), by="CONP_ID") %>%
  mutate(Clinical_diagnosis = if_else(is.na(Clinical_diagnosis), "CN", Clinical_diagnosis)) %>%
  mutate(Candidate_Age = Candidate_Age/12) %>%
  mutate(Ethnicity = str_to_sentence(Ethnicity)) %>%
  # Changing labels
  mutate(Education_level = case_when(Education_years <= 12 ~ "High school or less (竕､12 years)",
                                     Education_years > 12 & Education_years < 16 ~ "Some college (13-16 years)",
                                     Education_years > 16 ~ "Postgraduate",
                                     TRUE ~ NA) %>% factor(levels=c("High school or less (竕､12 years)",
                                                                    "Some college (13-16 years)",
                                                                    "Postgraduate"))) %>%
  relocate(Sex, .after=CONP_ID) %>%
  relocate(Candidate_Age, .after=Sex) %>%
  relocate(Education_level, .after=Education_years) %>%
  select(-CONP_ID) %>%
  tbl_summary(
    by = Clinical_diagnosis,
    # type = list(Hypertension ~ "categorical",
    #             High_cholesterol ~ "categorical",
    #             Depression ~ "categorical",
    #             Atrial_fibrillation ~ "categorical",
    #             TBI ~ "categorical"),
    label = list(Candidate_Age = "Age",
                 Education_years = "Education (years)",
                 Education_level = "Education (level)",
                 apoe_category = "APOE category"),
    statistic = list(all_continuous() ~ "{mean} ({sd})",
                     all_categorical() ~ "{n} ({p}%)")
  ) %>%
  modify_spanning_header(all_stat_cols() ~ "**Clinical diagnosis**") %>%
  modify_footnote(all_stat_cols() ~ "Mean (SD) for continuous; n (%) for categorical") %>%
  bold_labels() %>%
  italicize_levels() %>%
  as_gt() %>%
  #tab_row_group(label = md("*Medical History*"), rows = 13:31) %>%
  #tab_row_group(label = md("**Demographics**"), rows = 1:12) %>%
  tab_style(
    style = list(cell_text(weight = "bold"),
                 cell_fill(color = "#f8f9fa")),
    locations = cells_row_groups()
  )
table1_gtsummary

# gtsave(table1_gtsummary, filename = file.path(EDA_OUTPUT_PATH$tables, "PREVENT-AD_demographics.png"))
```


# Biomarkers
## Data availability table
```{r}
biomarker_cols <- names(biomarkers)[7:18]

table2_gtsummary <- biomarkers %>%
  pivot_longer(
    cols = all_of(biomarker_cols),
    names_to = "biomarker",
    values_to = "value"
  ) %>%
  group_by(CONP_ID, biomarker) %>%
  summarise(
    has_data = any(!is.na(value)),
    has_2plus = sum(!is.na(value)) >= 2,
    .groups = "drop"
  ) %>%
  group_by(biomarker) %>%
  summarise(
    `竕･1 Measurement` = sum(has_data),
    `竕･2 Measurements` = sum(has_2plus),
    total_n = n_distinct(CONP_ID),
    .groups = "drop"
  ) %>%
  mutate(
    `竕･1 Measurement` = paste0(`竕･1 Measurement`, " (", round(`竕･1 Measurement`/total_n*100, 1), "%)"),
    `竕･2 Measurements` = paste0(`竕･2 Measurements`, " (", round(`竕･2 Measurements`/total_n*100, 1), "%)")
  ) %>%
  select(-total_n) %>%
  gt() %>%
  cols_label(
    biomarker = md("**Biomarker**"),
    `竕･1 Measurement` = md("**竕･1 Measurement**"),
    `竕･2 Measurements` = md("**竕･2 Measurements**")
  ) %>%
  tab_footnote(
    footnote = "Number and percentage of participants with specified number of measurements",
    locations = cells_column_labels(columns = c(`竕･1 Measurement`, `竕･2 Measurements`))
  ) %>%
  tab_style(
    style = list(cell_text(style = "italic")),
    locations = cells_body(columns = biomarker)
  )

table2_gtsummary
gtsave(table2_gtsummary, filename = file.path(EDA_OUTPUT_PATH$tables, "PREVENT-AD_BBM_dataavail.png"))
```

## Biomarker summary statistics
```{r}
# Summary statistics of biomarker data
biomarker_cols <- c("AB_ratio_simoa_4plex", "GFAP_simoa_4plex", "NFL_simoa_4plex",
                    "ptau181_simoa_UGOT", "ptau217_simoa_UGOT", "ptau231_simoa_UGOT")

biomarker_table1 <- biomarkers %>%
  select(CONP_ID, all_of(biomarker_cols)) %>%
  group_by(CONP_ID) %>%
  summarise_at(.vars = biomarker_cols, .funs=c(mean="mean"), na.rm=TRUE) %>%
  left_join((diagnosis %>%
               select(CONP_ID, Clinical_diagnosis) %>%
               group_by(CONP_ID) %>%
               slice_tail()), 
            by="CONP_ID") %>%
  select(-CONP_ID) %>%
  tbl_summary(
    by=Clinical_diagnosis,
    missing="no",
    statistic = list(all_continuous() ~ "{mean} ({sd}) [{min}-{max}]",
                     all_categorical() ~ "{n} ({p})"),
    label = list(AB_ratio_simoa_4plex_mean = "Aﾎｲ42/Aﾎｲ40",
                 GFAP_simoa_4plex_mean = "GFAP (pg/mL)",
                 NFL_simoa_4plex_mean = "NfL (pg/mL)",
                 ptau181_simoa_UGOT_mean = "p-tau 181 (pg/mL)",
                 ptau217_simoa_UGOT_mean = "p-tau 217 (pg/mL)",
                 ptau231_simoa_UGOT_mean = "p-tau 231 (pg/mL)")
  ) %>%
  bold_labels() %>%
  as_gt()
biomarker_table1
gtsave(biomarker_table1, filename = file.path(EDA_OUTPUT_PATH$tables, "PREVENT-AD_BBM_mean.png"))
```

# Family history table
```{r}
table3_gtsummary <- PREVENTAD_dat$family_history %>%
  left_join((diagnosis %>%
               group_by(CONP_ID) %>%
               slice_tail() %>%
              select(CONP_ID, Clinical_diagnosis)), by="CONP_ID") %>%
  mutate(
    father_dx_ad_dementia = as.factor(if_else(father_dx_ad_dementia == 0, "No", "Yes")),
    mother_dx_ad_dementia = as.factor(if_else(mother_dx_ad_dementia == 0, "No", "Yes")),
    sibling_dx_ad_dementia = as.factor(if_else(sibling_dx_ad_dementia == 0, "No", "Yes")),
    Clinical_diagnosis = if_else(is.na(Clinical_diagnosis), "CN", Clinical_diagnosis)) %>%
  select(-CONP_ID) %>%
  tbl_summary(
    by = Clinical_diagnosis,
    type = list(all_dichotomous() ~ "categorical",
                sibling_dx_ad_dementia_count ~ "continuous",
                sibling_onset_age_1 ~ "continuous",
                sibling_onset_age_2 ~ "continuous",
                sibling_onset_age_3 ~ "continuous",
                other_family_members_AD ~ "continuous",
                other_maternal_family_members_AD ~ "continuous",
                other_paternal_family_members_AD ~ "continuous"),
    label = list(father_dx_ad_dementia = "Father affected with AD-like dementia",
                 father_onset_age = "Age of father at AD-like dementia onset",
                 mother_dx_ad_dementia = "Mother affected with AD-like dementia",
                 mother_onset_age = "Age of mother at AD-like dementia onset",
                 sibling_dx_ad_dementia = "Sibling(s) affected with AD-like dementia",
                 sibling_dx_ad_dementia_count = "Number of siblings affected",
                 sibling_onset_age_1 = "Age of sibling 1 at AD-like dementia onset",
                 sibling_onset_age_2 = "Age of sibling 2 at AD-like dementia onset",
                 sibling_onset_age_3 = "Age of sibling 3 at AD-like dementia onset",
                 other_family_members_AD = "Total number of other family members affected with AD-like dementia",
                 other_maternal_family_members_AD = "Maternal",
                 other_paternal_family_members_AD = "Paternal"),
    statistic = list(all_continuous() ~ "{mean} ({sd})",
                     all_categorical() ~ "{n} ({p}%)")
  ) %>%
  add_n() %>%
  remove_row_type(type = "missing") %>%
  modify_spanning_header(all_stat_cols() ~ "**Clinical Diagnosis**") %>%
  modify_column_indent(columns = label,
                       rows = variable %in% c("father_onset_age", "mother_onset_age"),
                       indent = 8) %>%
  modify_column_indent(columns = label, 
                       rows = variable %in% c("sibling_onset_age_1",
                                              "sibling_onset_age_2",
                                              "sibling_onset_age_3",
                                              "other_maternal_family_members_AD",
                                              "other_paternal_family_members_AD")) %>%
  modify_footnote(all_stat_cols() ~ "Mean (SD) for continuous; n (%) for categorical") %>%
  bold_labels() %>%
  italicize_levels() %>%
  remove_bold(columns = label, rows = variable %in% c("father_onset_age", 
                                                      "mother_onset_age",
                                                      "sibling_onset_age_1",
                                                      "sibling_onset_age_2",
                                                      "sibling_onset_age_3",
                                                      "other_maternal_family_members_AD",
                                                      "other_paternal_family_members_AD")) %>%
  as_gt() %>%
  tab_style(
    style = list(cell_text(weight = "bold"), 
                 cell_fill(color = "#f8f9fa")),
    locations = cells_row_groups()
  )
table3_gtsummary

# gtsave(table3_gtsummary, filename = file.path(EDA_OUTPUT_PATH$tables, "PREVENT-AD_fhx.png"))
```
